name: Bristol-Myers Squibb Company
description: Bristol-Myers Squibb Company is a global biopharmaceutical company focused on discovering, developing, and delivering innovative medicines that help patients prevail over serious diseases. The company specializes in key therapeutic areas, including oncology, hematology, immunology, cardiovascular disease, and fibrotic diseases. Headquartered in Princeton, New Jersey, Bristol Myers Squibb operates worldwide, leveraging cutting-edge scientific research to address significant unmet medical needs and improve patient outcomes globally.
